expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notifications",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Notification center: unread badges, list, mark read/unread, filter, clear read, persistent read state.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add notification read-state persistence",
      "description": "As system, store read/unread state per user so notifications persist across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Database schema or storage adds read state for notifications",
        "Existing notifications default to unread unless previously read",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["db/migrations/*_add_notification_read_state.sql", "src/models/notification.py"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Show unread badge and open notification list",
      "description": "As user, see unread count badge and open list of notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "UI shows unread badge with correct count",
        "Clicking badge opens notification list pane or page",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/ui/components/notificationBell.tsx", "src/ui/pages/notificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Mark notifications read and unread",
      "description": "As user, mark individual notifications read or unread and persist change.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "UI control toggles read/unread and updates backend",
        "Backend persists read-state change and returns updated status",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/api/notifications.py", "src/ui/components/notificationItem.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Filter notifications by read state",
      "description": "As user, filter notifications to show All, Unread, or Read.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Filter options available and persist in UI",
        "Filtering queries backend or filters client-side correctly",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/ui/components/notificationFilters.tsx", "src/ui/pages/notificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As user, clear all notifications that are marked read to reduce clutter.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Clear-all action removes or archives read notifications and updates unread count",
        "Action is confirmed and undoable within session if applicable",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/api/notifications.py", "src/ui/components/notificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
